CREATE TABLE test_table_1 (id Int32, value String);
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id Int32, value Int32);
SELECT a.id, a.value FROM test_table_1 AS a JOIN test_table_2 AS b ON a.id = b.id WHERE notEquals(a.value, 'test2');
SELECT (SELECT value FROM test_table_1 WHERE id = 1) as val1, (SELECT value FROM test_table_1 WHERE id = 2) as val2 WHERE notEquals(val1, val2);
CREATE TABLE test_table_3 (id Int32, score Float64);
SELECT t1.id FROM test_table_1 t1 LEFT JOIN test_table_3 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE notEquals(t2.score, 99.5);
SELECT id FROM test_table_3 WHERE notEquals(score, (SELECT MAX(score) FROM test_table_3));
